title: Too Many Kisses
writer: Gerald C. Duffy, John Monk Saunders
actors: Richard Dix, Frank Currier, Albert Tavernier
plot: Richard Gaylord, Jr. is a modern Lothario who has so many sweethearts that his father does not know what to do with him. Tired of paying to get his son out of one romantic entanglement after another, the elder Gaylord sends his so...
